center.name: Adolfo Ducke Forest Reserve
center.summary: Adolfo Ducke Forest Reserve是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Diademed amazon，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In the Adolfo Ducke Forest Reserve, near Manaus, it is common in the canopy of the humid forest and around the woodland margins. It also occurs in the Jaú National Park where it is uncommon

links.label: 分布于
